channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-29 21:25 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: FSD Supervised handles Amsterdam’s busiest streets with ease
item.description: FSD Supervised handles Amsterdam’s busiest streets with ease

item.title: @elonmusk: Europe will love Tesla self-driving! Due to the extreme regulatory burden of the EU, which in genera...
item.description: Europe will love Tesla self-driving! Due to the extreme regulatory burden of the EU, which in general stifles innovation in Europe, Tesla owners there have been stuck with basic lane-following.

item.title: @elonmusk: The fraudsters always come up with the most sympathetic excuses and do so very loudly, because that ...
item.description: The fraudsters always come up with the most sympathetic excuses and do so very loudly, because that is what swindlers do

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk exposes the critical flaw in ChatGPT and other major AI models: Human Reinforcement Learni...
item.description: Elon Musk exposes the critical flaw in ChatGPT and other major AI models: Human Reinforcement Learning They are literally training the AI to lie.....to ignore what the data actually demands and say whatever is politically correct instead They withhold information. They comment on some things and stay silent on others. They refuse to tell the full truth This is extremely dangerous We don’t need politically correct AI We need truth-seeking AI

item.title: @elonmusk: Ricky, an amazing 71-year-old man, bought his first Tesla solely for the Tesla Self-Driving software...
item.description: Ricky, an amazing 71-year-old man, bought his first Tesla solely for the Tesla Self-Driving software. Without it, he would have to rely on someone else to drive for him. The Elon Musk effect on humanity.

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla AI self-driving will be >10X safer than human driving
item.description: Tesla AI self-driving will be >10X safer than human driving

item.title: @elonmusk: Starship is the first planet-colonizer class rocket
item.description: Starship is the first planet-colonizer class rocket

item.title: @elonmusk: Also, every loaner comes with FSD Supervised And your settings & preferences will automatically sync...
item.description: Also, every loaner comes with FSD Supervised And your settings & preferences will automatically sync from your own Tesla

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX Falcon 9 family has now launched 636 times and counting 618 Falcon 9 flights - 99.52% success...
item.description: SpaceX Falcon 9 family has now launched 636 times and counting 618 Falcon 9 flights - 99.52% success rate Booster B1067: 33 flights on a SINGLE rocket In 2020, SpaceX launched 26 times - the entire year In 2026, SpaceX has already done 38 launches in 88 days That's 46% MORE than all of 2020 and we're not even in April Meanwhile, the rest of the world combined: ~29 launches in 2026 One company. More launches than every other country and company on Earth. Combined

item.title: @elonmusk: Delivering 119 satellites to orbit at once! Falcon 9, which can carry ~20 tons to orbit (with a reus...
item.description: Delivering 119 satellites to orbit at once! Falcon 9, which can carry ~20 tons to orbit (with a reusable booster & fairing), is a “heavy” class rocket by conventional standards.

item.title: @elonmusk: 9x safer means tens of thousands of lives saved if every car had FSD, and millions of accidents aver...
item.description: 9x safer means tens of thousands of lives saved if every car had FSD, and millions of accidents averted every year. Eventually, self-driving cars will be 100x safer, and it will be a major risk and liability to drive classic cars.

item.title: @elonmusk: Starship will make a Kardashev civilization Type II possible
item.description: Starship will make a Kardashev civilization Type II possible

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok is officially the ultimate wingman 😂 Stop embarrassing yourself trying to decode mixed signals....
item.description: Grok is officially the ultimate wingman 😂 Stop embarrassing yourself trying to decode mixed signals. Run those texts through Grok first.....it tells you the honest truth whenever you need to hear it You need an AI built for the real world. Grok never disappoints because it’s actually grounded in reality
